certification: UNDERPOWERED (DSR 0.894 < 0.95 — closest ever); forward wall is the only certifier — not promoted
live_exit_change: 2026-07-15 (owner decision, sole capital-at-risk): the LIVE exit was changed from the 13-week cap + 20-day-SMA trail to a TREND-FOLLOWING no-cap hold + a blow-off-bar exit @2.5R (+ 20-week-close backstop). Owner-OVERRIDE of the forward-wall route: it ships a portfolio Sharpe/CAGR give (1.132->1.034, 24.7->21.2%) for -8pp drawdown (-42.4->-34.8%), higher Calmar (0.58->0.61), +28% per-trade return (+0.481->+0.616R) and FEWER/longer-held trades (255->168) — the owner's rationale (eases the capital-contention/selection bottleneck). NOTE: win rate is LOWER (59%->54%), gain is bigger avg wins not more of them. Fails the standard dSharpe>=+0.10 promote gate; adopted as a defensive/selection variant. See docs/decisions ADR + research/config_CHANGELOG.md + finding 0099. The frozen 0094 research run (backtest defaults OFF) stays byte-identical 1.132/255.
provenance: pre-reg 0093/0094, findings 0037/0038 (Nifty-50 CRS signals + CRS-ranked fills, ordering-probe verified)

params.quality_green: close > open AND close in the upper half of the week's range
params.crs_rule: take signal only if weekly RS = stock/Nifty-50 is above its own 40-week SMA
params.fill_ranking: descending CRS distance = RS/SMA40(RS) - 1 at the signal week (finding 0038); fund strongest first
params.cap_weeks_note: 0094 research run used a 13-week cap; the LIVE exit removed it (52-week backstop) — see live_exit_change / exits
params.entry: in-range open the week after a green weekly bounce off the 44-week SMA
params.exits: half at +2R; then TREND-FOLLOWING: hold while trending, exit on (a) a BLOW-OFF weekly bar after 2.5R MFE — a new high that closes in the lower third of its weekly range (exhaustion), (b) the 20-day-SMA -4% ratchet trail, or (c) a 20-week-close -4% backstop; stop = signal-week low; NO time cap (52-week safety backstop); decided at the weekly close, filled Monday. Owner P2 exit, 2026-07-15. The 0094 research default (cfg levers OFF) is still half@2R + 20-day trail + 13-week cap.

backtest.note: in-sample; ranked fill verified by adversarial ordering probe (desc best, asc worst); slices +1.17/+1.05/+1.19; leakage-clean. Not indicative of future results.

live_discipline_change: 2026-07-16 (owner decision, sole capital-at-risk): the LIVE book adds ext_cap=0.20 (skip any fill priced >20% above the signal-week 44w SMA — a pure SELECTION rule; the stop is untouched), max_risk_pct=0.10 (stop = max(signal-week low, entry*0.90) — this LIFTS the stop off the candle low when the low is further, a deliberate DEVIATION from the taught rule per the owner's instruction that R above 10% is distorted), and max_notional_pct=0.20 (a GUARDRAIL against runaway single-name risk, NOT a performance lever — FINDING_more_slots showed concentration is load-bearing: 4-5 names 1.21 > 7 names 0.97 > 10 names 0.81 on the 22-26 slice). Owner-OVERRIDE on RISK APPETITE, not an edge claim: the owner pre-accepted a return cost. On the A-only traded book: Sharpe 1.004->1.055, CAGR 20.9->20.2%, MaxDD -36.4->-31.2% (+5.2pp), median R 13.7->9.1%, mean hold 19.1->12.4wk, win 54->51%, 2022-26 slice 1.17->1.04 (the one negative). RETURN-NEUTRAL and NOT CERTIFIED — no DSR gate passes a +0.05 in-sample delta at cumulative trial 122; it fails no gate because it was never an edge claim. See docs/decisions/0009-swing-discipline-config.md + research/config_CHANGELOG.md + research/substrate/FINDING_owner_discipline.md + research/preregistry_owner_discipline.md. The frozen 0094 research run (backtest defaults OFF) stays byte-identical 1.132/255.

live_backtest_discipline.grade_filter: A-only (top-5 CRS per setup week) — matches the traded book
live_backtest_discipline.note: THE LIVE BOOK AS OF 2026-07-16. Reproduce: backtest(prep_weekly_rank(ohlcv), a_grade=grade_a_entries(prep_weekly_rank(ohlcv)), ext_cap=0.20, max_risk_pct=0.10, max_notional_pct=0.20, no_time_cap=True, wk20_trail_pct=0.04, blowoff_arm_r=2.5). In-sample; return-neutral vs the p2exit block below, adopted for the drawdown and the R/hold discipline. Not indicative of future results.

live_backtest_p2exit.grade_filter: A-only (top-5 CRS per setup week) — matches the traded book
live_backtest_p2exit.note: SUPERSEDED 2026-07-16 by live_backtest_discipline (this is now the PRIOR live book, retained as the comparison baseline). The LIVE book as ACTUALLY TRADED at the time: P2 exit AND the Grade-A-only owner rule. run_bhanushali_cron.py builds a_set = grade_a_entries(P) and runs the paper book with a_grade=a_set (line ~349); the buy cards are likewise filtered to grade=='A' (line ~150). Reproduce: backtest(prep_weekly_rank(ohlcv), a_grade=grade_a_entries(prep_weekly_rank(ohlcv)), no_time_cap=True, wk20_trail_pct=0.04, blowoff_arm_r=2.5). NOTE the cron itself passes return_state=True (open positions are NOT realized — correct for a live book); this backtest figure uses the default return_state=False so end-of-window positions are realized. In-sample; a Sharpe/CAGR give for drawdown + higher per-trade capture vs the 0094 reference above. Not indicative of future results.
live_backtest_p2exit.corrected_2026_07_16: AUDIT FIX: this block previously carried the ALL-GRADES numbers (1.034 / 21.2% / -34.8% / 0.61 / 168 tr / 0.616R) and a Reproduce line that OMITTED a_grade — so the documented headline did not reproduce the book that actually trades. The all-grades variant remains a valid research reference and is statistically INDISTINGUISHABLE from the traded book: the 22-26 continuous-slice gap is 1.29 (all-grades) vs 1.17 (A-only) = 0.12, well inside the random-selection null's sigma of 0.24 (research/substrate/MONTECARLO_null.md). A-only is a board/discipline choice, not a return decision. See research/substrate/STRATEGY_AUDIT.md.

all_grades_reference_p2exit.note: Research reference only — NOT the traded book. Same P2 exit, no a_grade filter. Reproduce: backtest(prep_weekly_rank(ohlcv), no_time_cap=True, wk20_trail_pct=0.04, blowoff_arm_r=2.5).
